CONSTANTS N, Participants, Coordinator

VARIABLES state, votes, messages

(* -- Votes: mapping from participant to "Yes" or "No" -- *)
Vote(p) == votes[p]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is owned by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
(* philosopher state: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == state[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == state[i] = "thinking"

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == 
  /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = -1
  /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = -1

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = -1, ![RightFork(i)] = -1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

HungryToEating(i) == 
  /\ Hungry(i)
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ TakeForks(i)

EatingToThinking(i) == 
  /\ Eating(i)
  /\ PutForks(i)

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (HungryToEating(i) \/ EatingToThinking(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>> /\ TypeOK

---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery *)
   VARIABLES num, flag

   Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
          /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots *)
(* head and tail are indices into q, ranging from 0 to K-1 *)
(* size is the number of elements currently in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ K \in Nat
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

Producer == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Subst(q, tail, [x \in 0..K-1 |-> IF x = tail THEN "P" ELSE q[x]])
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \% K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Subst(q, head, [x \in 0..K-1 |-> IF x = head THEN "C" ELSE q[x]])
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \% K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == 
  /\ TypeOK
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels, Messages, Marker

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ channel \in [Channels -> Seq(Nat)]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>
        /\ recorded = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a normal message from process i to process j *)
SendMsg(i, j, m) == /\ i \in 1..N
                     /\ j \in 1..N
                     /\ (i, j) \in Channels
                     /\ m \in Nat
                     /\ channel[(i, j)]' = Append(channel[(i, j)], m)
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) == /\ i \in 1..N
                     /\ j \in 1..N
                     /\ (i, j) \in Channels
                     /\ markerSent[(i, j)]' = TRUE
                     /\ channel[(i, j)]' = Append(channel[(i, j)], Marker)
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a normal message on channel i->j *)
ReceiveMsg(i, j, m) == /\ i \in 1..N
                        /\ j \in 1..N
                        /\ (i, j) \in Channels
                        /\ channel[(i, j)] = <<m |-> rest>>
                        /\ channel[(i, j)]' = rest
                        /\ state[j]' = state[j] + 1
                        /\ UNCHANGED <<recorded, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel i->j *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) == /\ i \in 1..N
                        /\ j \in 1..N
                        /\ (i, j) \in Channels
                        /\ channel[(i, j)] = <<Marker |-> rest>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ Keys \subseteq DOMAIN store
    /\ Values \subseteq RANGE store

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ \E k \in Keys, v \in Values :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    \/ \E k \in Keys :
        /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)

(* Helper definitions *)
chunkCount == Len(chunks)
chunkIndex == i \in 1..chunkCount
chunk(i) == SubSeq(chunks, i, CHUNK_SIZE)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ file \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ chunks == SubSeq(file, 1, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks == <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount == 0
    /\ channel == <<>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    /\ sentChunks' == sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount
    /\ channel' == channel
    /\ 
        \E i \in 1..chunkCount :
            /\ i \notin sentChunks
            /\ 
                \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
                    /\ loss == TRUE
                    /\ channel' == Append(channel, chunk(i))
                    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount + 1
                    /\ sentChunks' == sentChunks
            \/ 
                \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
                    /\ loss == FALSE
                    /\ channel' == Append(channel, chunk(i))
                    /\ sentChunks' == Append(sentChunks, i)
                    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in Seq(N)
          /\ offsets \in Seq(N)
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in Nat
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in Int
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in -maxDrift..maxDrift

(* Initialisation *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Helper to compute average clock value *)
AvgClock == (1 / N) * Sum(i \in 1..N, clocks[i] + offsets[i])

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N :
          /\ offsets[i]' = offsets[i] + (AvgClock - (clocks[i] + offsets[i]))
          /\ clocks[i]' = clocks[i] + offsets[i]'
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>   \* No other variables

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Updates

VARIABLES known, infected

(* known: a mapping from node IDs to the set of updates they know *)
(* infected: a set of node IDs that are infected (i.e., have received at least one update) *)

(* TypeOK ensures that known is a mapping from node IDs to subsets of Updates *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ known \in [1..N -> [Updates -> BOOLEAN]]
  /\ infected \subseteq 1..N

(* Init: initially, each node knows a subset of Updates (could be empty), and infected is empty *)
Init == 
  /\ known \in [1..N -> [Updates -> BOOLEAN]]
  /\ infected = {}

(* Next: a node that is infected spreads its known updates to a random subset of other nodes *)
Next == 
  /\ \E i \in infected:
       \E j \in 1..N \ {i}:
         \E newUpdates \subseteq Updates:
           /\ newUpdates \subseteq Updates
           /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![j] = known[j] \cup newUpdates]
           /\ infected' = infected \cup {j}
  /\ \E i \in 1..N \ infected:
       \E j \in 1..N \ {i}:
         \E newUpdates \subseteq Updates:
           /\ newUpdates \subseteq Updates
           /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![j] = known[j] \cup newUpdates]
           /\ infected' = infected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>> /\ TypeOK

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

(* TypeOK ensures that free is a subset of Pages and allocated maps each client to a subset of Pages *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]

(* Init: all pages are free, no client has any pages allocated *)
Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Next: a client can request or release pages *)
Next == 
  \/ \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages :
       /\ p \in free
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
       /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages :
       /\ p \in allocated[c]
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
       /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId
Topic == [name: STRING]
Message == [id: Nat, topic: Topic, content: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
PublisherId == Nat

\* Helper functions
IsTopic(t) == t \in DOMAIN messages
IsSubscriber(s) == s \in DOMAIN subscribers

\* Initialization
Init ==
  /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic : {}]
  /\ messages = [t \in Topic : <<>>]
  /\ nextMsgId = 1
  /\ nextSubId = 1

\* Actions
RegisterSubscriber(t) ==
  /\ IsTopic(t)
  /\ nextSubId \in Nat
  /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {nextSubId}]
  /\ nextSubId' = nextSubId + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId>>

PostMessage(t, c) ==
  /\ IsTopic(t)
  /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], [id |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> t, content |-> c])]
  /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

DeliverMessage(t, m) ==
  /\ IsTopic(t)
  /\ m \in messages[t]
  /\ subscribers[t] \in SUBSET SubscriberId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

Next ==
  \/ \E t \in Topic : RegisterSubscriber(t)
  \/ \E t \in Topic, c \in STRING : PostMessage(t, c)
  \/ \E t \in Topic, m \in messages[t] : DeliverMessage(t, m)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
  /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
  /\ messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]
  /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
  /\ nextSubId \in Nat

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants



(* --type invariants
   TypeOK == 
      /\ turn \in {1, 2}
      /\ \A i \in {1, 2} : wants[i] \in BOOLEAN
*)

(* --safety invariant
   MutualExclusion == 
      \A i, j \in {1, 2} : (i # j) => ~(wants[i] /\ wants[j])
*)

(* --liveness invariant
   Liveness == 
      \A i \in {1, 2} : 
         (wants[i] /\ turn = i) => <> (turn = j /\ wants[j] = FALSE)
*)

(* --combined invariant
   TypeOK /\ MutualExclusion /\ Liveness
*)

(* --TLC configuration
   SPECIFICATION Spec
   INVARIANT TypeOK
*)

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES counts



(* --operator
  Init == /\ counts = [n \in 1..N |-> [m \in 1..N |-> 0]]
  Next == \E n \in 1..N :
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in 1..N |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
    /\ UNCHANGED << counts >>
  Total(n) == SUM m \in 1..N : counts[m][n]
  GlobalTotal == SUM n \in 1..N : Total(n)
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
*)
